title: Domain-Wall Edge-Mode Notation Family
summary: Canonical notation family for the mass sign, folded wall equation, and chiral boundary spinor appearing across the Lecture Three continuum edge-mode theorem family.
assumptions: Several nearby units reuse the same mass-wall and boundary-spinor notation.
regime: Shared notation for the continuum edge-mode theorem family.
scope: Notation family for the Lecture Three anomaly and domain-wall branch.

source_anchors.notes: Shared notation for the half-level anomaly and the wall mode.

representation: Notation-family object for the Lecture Three continuum edge-mode theorem family.
retrieval_hints: Use when an answer mixes the parity-anomaly, folding, and wall-mode symbols.
